quote.productName: SPF 50 Daily Moisturizer — No White Cast

actives.note: Hybrid UV filter system — avobenzone + octisalate + zinc oxide; photostability testing required

regulatory.note: US OTC drug product — in vivo SPF 50 testing, Drug Facts panel, FDA monograph compliance; high regulatory burden

format.note: Gel-cream emulsion — standard emulsion process but UV filter incorporation requires optimization

packaging.note: 50mL pump bottle — standard packaging; compatibility testing required for OTC drug product

volume.note: Low initial MOQ (3,000–5,000 units) — indie launch profile

keyAssumptions: In vivo SPF 50 testing ($8,000–$15,000) is included in the development fee range estimate
Client-sourced primary packaging (50mL pump bottle) — no tooling cost included
Assumes US-only regulatory scope — Health Canada registration not included
Broad-spectrum critical wavelength testing included in development scope
Formula iterations capped at 3 rounds before additional development fees apply
quote.disclaimer: This is an indicative estimate based on a discovery conversation. Final pricing requires formal technical review, BOM costing, and capacity confirmation. OTC drug product development fees are higher than cosmetics due to regulatory testing requirements. Not a binding commitment.
